assertions.description: The analyzer correctly reports a 4-layer board (F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, B.Cu) with In1.Cu and In2.Cu both typed as 'power' layers. This matches the design intent for a cartridge PCB with dedicated power planes. Board dimensions (91.567 x 43.434 mm) are consistent with a Sega Genesis/Mega Drive cartridge PCB. All 192 vias and 1501 track segments are present with routing_complete=true.
